description_long: This is a white plastic bottle of Johnson's skin nourish sweet apple lotion, featuring a pump dispenser at the top for easy use. The front of the bottle displays a large, teardrop-shaped label with pink and blue text, as well as small heart graphics and an apple illustration. The bottle has a slightly curved, ergonomic shape that tapers toward the top and bottom, making it comfortable to hold. The back of the bottle contains detailed product information, instructions, and a barcode, all printed in orange and white. The pump mechanism is cylindrical and sits atop a wide, flat cap, designed for dispensing lotion in controlled amounts. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A white plastic pump bottle of Johnson's skin nourish sweet apple lotion with colorful graphics and a teardrop-shaped label.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with brand, product name, and decorative graphics.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bottle's slim profile and the pump mechanism from the side.
description_view_2: Back view displaying product information, instructions, and a barcode.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bottle's slim profile and the pump from another angle.
